name: Compare Payment Gateways and Features

[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Payment gateways allow customers to make credit card purchases in your online store. Compare features and choose a platform that suits your needs.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When choosing a payment gateway, it's important to do research to ensure you get the features you need for your business and the value for money.
